problem.statement: SCE needs canonical scaffold and ownership extension semantics, but they should be delivered after preview/open and without creating adapter-owned ownership truth.
problem.scope: Later-phase scaffold result and ownership relation extension, after preview/open semantics stabilize.
problem.symptom: Broader onboarding drafts make scaffold and ownership look like phase-1 blockers even though they are later extensions.

hypotheses.statement: Separating scaffold and ownership from preview/open will reduce onboarding scope drift and preserve a cleaner rollout order.

risks.statement: Scaffold work may accidentally block phase-1 preview/open delivery if rollout order is not explicit.

decision_execution_path.decision: ownership extension remains engine-owned and does not create frontend-local truth

triggers: spec begins to include preview/open semantics
frontend starts caching ownership truth independently
actions: attach debug evidence when ownership mapping becomes ambiguous
